subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness in the Realm of Eternity that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Mighty, the Inaccessible, the All-Powerful, and I bear witness at the Throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله فی قطب البقا بانه لا اله الا هو المهیمن العزیز الممتنع القدیر و اشهد فی عرش
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @personal instructions
